description_long: This object is a modern crossbow featuring a robust black metal frame and a wooden stock, blending traditional and contemporary design elements. The limbs are wide and reinforced, connected by a central rail that guides the bolt, and the trigger mechanism is housed beneath the main body. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a dark wood finish, providing a comfortable grip and shoulder support. The crossbow includes a sighting system mounted on top for improved accuracy, and the stirrup at the front allows for easier cocking. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible bolts and mechanical components. The combination of metal and wood gives it a tactical yet classic appearance suitable for urban or survival scenarios.
description: A modern crossbow with a black metal frame, wide limbs, and a dark wooden stock, featuring a mounted sight and ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, wooden stock, and the mounted sight on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide limbs, central rail, and the sighting system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the trigger mechanism and the detailed wooden stock.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the symmetry of the limbs and the central rail.
